meaning: He is supremely blessed (referring to Allah)
the One who (refers to Allah in this ayah)
all-powerful, having complete ability (describing Allah in this ayah)
the death (object of خَلَقَ - He created)
in order that he tests you all (purpose of خَلَقَ/created)
which of you (asking who among you is أَحْسَنُ)
The Most Forgiving (One of Allah's names)
The one who (connects to خَلَقَ - the one who created)
heavens (being described as seven in number)
The Most Merciful (possessed by/connected to something)
the vision (object of فَٱرْجِعِ - return/look back)
from (shows that تَفٰوُتٍ comes from خَلْقِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ)
any cracks/breaks (in خَلْقِ ٱلرَّحْمٰنِ - the creation of the Most Merciful)
return! (command to one person) (followed by ٱلْبَصَرَ - your vision)
two times (of looking back at ٱلْبَصَرَ)
being driven away in disgrace (describing the state of البَصَرُ/vision)
and it (referring to ٱلْبَصَرُ - the vision)
we beautified intensely (subject of the verb that describes what Allah did to the sky)
the sky (object of زَيَّنَّا - we adorned)
and we made them (the مَصٰبِيحَ/lamps) into (رُجُومًا/projectiles)
as things thrown (to drive away devils) (object of جَعَلْنٰهَا)
for them (referring to الشَّيٰطِينِ - the devils)
punishment (possessed by السَّعِيرِ - the blazing fire)
and for those who (subject of كَفَرُوا)
and how evil! (connects to عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَ - punishment of Hell)
when (introducing what happens when they are thrown)
a gasping sound (object of سَمِعُوا/they heard)
whenever (introduces a repeated condition in this ayah)
a group (of people thrown into Hell, as the subject)
he asked them (the guardians asked the people of hell)
comes to you all (question about whether a warner came to them)
they said (referring to the disbelievers speaking to the angels)
yes indeed! (contradicting their denial in قَالُوا)
a warner (subject of جَآءَنَا - came to us)
he sent down repeatedly (subject of Allah)
except (what comes after negates what came before)
in (describing the state of being in ضَلٰلٍ كَبِيرٍ - great error)
and they said (referring to the disbelievers in hell)
we hear/listen (connected to لَوْ 'if' in this ayah)
we understand (in response to لَوْ كُنَّا - 'if we had')
so away with them! (expressing complete rejection)
of the intensely blazing fire (describing أَصْحٰبِ - companions)
Those who - connects descriptions to people or things
their Lord (the one who nurtures and takes care of them, referring to الَّذِينَ - those who)
and they made secret (of قَوْلَكُمْ - your speech)
with/by what is in (الصُّدُورِ - the chests)
the gentle, kind, or subtle one (doer)
its paths (referring to the earth's paths)
and to Him (connected to النُّشُورُ/the resurrection)
who/whoever (emphasized, asking about the subject of يَخْسِفَ)
that (introduces the clause يَخْسِفَ - He should cause to swallow)
he causes to sink (subject of أَن)
the earth (object of يَخْسِفَ - swallow up)
and then/and suddenly (connects to هِىَ تَمُورُ)
you all felt safe (asking a group in the past)
that (connects to يُرْسِلَ, showing what might happen)
a violent storm of stones (object of يُرْسِلَ)
and/so you all will know/understand (consequence of أَمِنتُم)
And surely indeed (connects to previous statement)
those who (refers to those who denied before them)
they see (looking at الطَّيْرِ - the birds)
spreading ones (describing the birds above them)
and they (feminine) grasp (referring to the birds above them)
indeed he (referring to الرَّحْمٰنُ - The Most Merciful)
or who? (asking about هٰذَا ٱلَّذِى - this one who)
who/which/that (connects to هُوَ جُندٌ - 'he is a soldier')
surely for you all (object of يَنصُرُكُم - helps/supports you)
he helps/is helping you all (as a group)
any kind of tricks or lies (that fool people)
Who is it that... (introduces a rhetorical question in أَمَّنْ هٰذَا ٱلَّذِى يَرْزُقُكُمْ)
who/which/that (connects to يَرْزُقُكُمْ - provides for you)
he provides sustenance to you all
rather/but (contrasts with what was said before about رِزْق/provision)
in extreme arrogance (describing how they persist)
and in running away (connected to عُتُوٍّ)
falling forward on his face (state while يَمْشِى)
his face (possessed by مُكِبًّا - the one falling)
or the one who (contrasts with أَفَمَن/the one who in the previous phrase)
in a perfectly straight manner (describes يَمْشِى/walking)
on/upon (preposition showing position above وَجْهِهِ - his face)
he created you all (connected to وَجَعَلَ - and made)
little (describes how much is done of تَشْكُرُونَ - you give thanks)
the one who (refers to هُوَ - He)
he created you all (referring to all humanity)
and they (men) say/are saying (asking about مَتَىٰ هٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ)
say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ before إِنَّمَا)
they saw him (object of seeing in زُلْفَةً)
a single instance of coming close (as a state/condition)
faces (subject of سِيٓـَٔتْ - were made evil/distressed)
they disbelieved (subject of قِيلَ - it was said)
and it was said (connecting to the previous ayah)
with/by/in him/it (referring to what they used to claim)
you all claim/used to claim (referring to the disbelievers in the ayah)
say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the disbelievers)
who (asking about the one in ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ - clear error)
he (subject of the sentence, referring to الرَّحْمٰنُ)
one who makes very clear (in error/misguidance)
it became (something happened to the water in مَآؤُكُمْ)
your water (referring to 'if your water becomes sunken')
sunken deep (describing what happens to the water)
he comes/arrives to you all (addressing multiple people)
with water (connected to يَأْتِيكُم - brings to you)
flowing water (being described in this ayah)
